expectations.text: Should describe 2-stage flow: push_all_remotes then verify_parity_post_push
expectations.evidence: 3-stage flow (stage 0 snapshot + push + verify) described precisely

expectations.text: Should emphasize success = (exit_code == 0) AND (post_remote_head == pre_local_head), NOT message text
expectations.evidence: Explicit rule stated, refs helper api.md

expectations.text: Should capture pre_local_head SHA before push as expected_sha parameter
Should pass expected_sha to verify_parity_post_push to avoid race conditions
Should clarify that 'Everything up-to-date' is only success if post SHA matches pre local SHA
expectations.evidence: Explicitly noted in Stage 1 success criteria

expectations.text: Should NOT recommend relying on exit code alone for multi-remote scenarios
